name: Project Codename: Horizon
description: Executive reporting dashboard rollout - Consolidated project milestone tracking and KPI visualization for executive presentations

milestones.name: Phase 1: MVP Launch
milestones.description: Core dashboard functionality complete with basic milestone and work item tracking

milestones.name: Phase 2: Metrics Expansion
milestones.description: Enhanced KPI tracking, health status indicators, and velocity metrics

milestones.name: Phase 2.5: Screenshot Optimization
milestones.description: Print-optimized CSS for PowerPoint screenshot capture at 1280x720 and 1920x1080

milestones.name: Phase 3: Integration
milestones.description: Third-party data source integration and advanced filtering capabilities

milestones.name: Phase 4: Performance & Scale
milestones.description: Caching layer optimization and support for large project datasets

milestones.name: Phase 5: Release Candidate
milestones.description: Final testing, documentation, and production deployment readiness

workItems.title: Blazor Server Application Setup
workItems.description: Create ASP.NET Core 8.0 Blazor Server application with local HTTP binding

workItems.title: Data Model Definition
workItems.description: Define Project, Milestone, and WorkItem entity models with JSON serialization

workItems.title: CSS Framework Integration
workItems.description: Integrate Pico CSS 2.x framework for minimalist, professional styling

workItems.title: Dashboard Grid Layout
workItems.description: Create responsive CSS grid layout for header, timeline, metrics, and work items sections

workItems.title: Print Media Queries
workItems.description: Add @media print CSS optimization for 1280x720 and 1920x1080 screenshot capture

workItems.title: DataProvider Service Implementation
workItems.description: Implement JSON file reading, parsing, validation, and in-memory caching

workItems.title: DashboardLayout Component
workItems.description: Create main layout component that loads data and renders child components

workItems.title: MilestoneTimeline Component
workItems.description: Build horizontal timeline visualization using Chart.js with status indicators

workItems.title: ProjectMetrics Component
workItems.description: Display KPI cards for completion %, health status, and velocity indicators

workItems.title: WorkItemSummary Component
workItems.description: Render 3-column work item layout grouped by status (Shipped/InProgress/CarriedOver)

workItems.title: Error Handling & Validation
workItems.description: Implement graceful error handling for missing or malformed data.json

workItems.title: Browser Testing - Chrome 120+
workItems.description: Verify dashboard rendering and functionality in Chrome latest

workItems.title: Browser Testing - Edge 120+
workItems.description: Verify dashboard rendering and functionality in Edge latest

workItems.title: Screenshot Testing - 1024x768
workItems.description: Capture and verify dashboard appearance at minimum supported resolution

workItems.title: Screenshot Testing - 1280x720
workItems.description: Capture and verify dashboard appearance at HD presentation resolution

workItems.title: Screenshot Testing - 1920x1080
workItems.description: Capture and verify dashboard appearance at Full HD resolution

workItems.title: Documentation - Setup Guide
workItems.description: Create comprehensive README with setup instructions and deployment steps

workItems.title: Documentation - data.json Schema
workItems.description: Document data.json structure, required fields, enums, and validation rules
